title: Apply treatments to trees
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply treatments to trees demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to apply tree treatments

pcs.text: Confirm trees to be treated and work activity instructions with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm trees to be treated and work activity instructions with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm trees to be treated and work activity instructions with supervisor.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls from job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls from job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace health and safety hazards and controls from job safety analysis (JSA) with supervisor.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Select, prepare and carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, prepare and carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, prepare and carry out pre-operational and safety checks on tools and equipment.

pcs.text: Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm availability of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Select and prepare treatment tools and equipment according to workplace and biosecurity procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and prepare treatment tools and equipment according to workplace and biosecurity procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and prepare treatment tools and equipment according to workplace and biosecurity procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to apply tree treatments

elements.title: Modify environment to maintain health and vigour of tree

pcs.text: Undertake weed control measures to remove competing plants according to treatment instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake weed control measures to remove competing plants according to treatment instructions.

pcs.text: Apply plant-based mulch according to treatment instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply plant-based mulch according to treatment instructions.

pcs.text: Use tools and equipment for de-compaction of soil according to supervisor and equipment manufacturer instructions

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use tools and equipment for de-compaction of soil according to supervisor and equipment manufacturer instructions.

elements.title: Complete treatment operations

pcs.text: Clean site, collect and store unused materials and dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean site, collect and store unused materials and dispose of waste according to workplace and environmental procedures.
